output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY10-018","author":"OakhavenWatch_42","text":"BREAKING: Multiple residents in Oakhaven are saying the local water supply is unsafe to drink right now! 🚨 There's a blurry image circulating that supposedly shows 'discoloured' pipes and a warning sign, but it's hard to make out what exactly it depicts.
